competitions.name: MATHCOUNTS Competition Series

access.notes: local chapter & state rounds (varies by chapter)

competitions.typical_window: school round fall; chapter Feb; state Mar; national May
competitions.source_notes: Register through school. 2026 nationals were May 10-11 (Orlando); 2026-27 registration not yet open as of verification.

competitions.name: AMC 8 (Mathematical Association of America)

access.notes: school or local AMC test center

competitions.typical_window: administered late January
competitions.source_notes: Grades 8 and below. 2026 AMC 8 ran Jan 22-30, 2026; 2026-27 AMC 8 is Jan 21-27, 2027. School registers.

competitions.name: AMC 10 / AMC 12 (Mathematical Association of America)

access.notes: school or local AMC test center

competitions.typical_window: administered November; AIME qualifiers in February
competitions.source_notes: AMC 10 = grade 10 and below; AMC 12 = grade 12 and below. Gateway to AIME/USAMO. School registers.

competitions.name: Math Kangaroo (USA)
competitions.typical_window: registration Sep 15-Dec 31 (late to Feb 1); contest mid-March
competitions.source_notes: 2026 contest was Mar 19, 2026. Family can register directly; not school-gated.

competitions.name: Math Olympiads for Elementary & Middle Schools (MOEMS)

access.notes: run at your own school as a team

competitions.typical_window: five monthly contests Nov-Mar; register by mid-fall
competitions.source_notes: School/club enrolls a team. Early-bird payment by Jul 31; standard by Oct 15.

competitions.name: Noetic Learning Math Contest
competitions.typical_window: fall window (Oct-Nov) and spring window (Apr)
competitions.source_notes: Biannual; grades 2-8. Spring 2026 was Apr 17-24. Administered by a school/club coordinator.

competitions.name: New Jersey Math League / AMTNJ Contests
competitions.typical_window: contest dates through the school year
competitions.source_notes: State-level (NJ) example; most states have an equivalent league via their math educators association. School-registered. Confirm the current schedule.

competitions.name: Math League (contests + annual summer tournament)

access.notes: national contests; annual summer International Tournament

competitions.typical_window: school-year contests; international summer tournament
competitions.source_notes: National math contests plus an annual summer tournament. Confirm current dates.

competitions.name: Science Olympiad

access.notes: state & regional tournaments (find your state affiliate)

competitions.typical_window: regionals winter; state late winter/spring; nationals May
competitions.source_notes: Team event via school. Most states run active regional & state tournaments (2026 state finals held).

competitions.name: USA Computing Olympiad (USACO)
competitions.typical_window: online contests Dec-Mar; US Open in March
competitions.source_notes: Open to any student; free; fully online. Promotion through Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum divisions.

competitions.name: North American Computational Linguistics Open (NACLO)

access.notes: university & high-school test sites; online option

competitions.typical_window: open round late January; invitational round March
competitions.source_notes: No linguistics background needed. CONFIRM current-year test sites and date.

competitions.name: Regeneron Science Talent Search (Society for Science)
competitions.typical_window: application opens June; due November; finalists named January
competitions.source_notes: High school seniors, original research. 2027 application opened June 1, 2026.

competitions.name: Regeneron International Science and Engineering Fair (ISEF)

access.notes: qualify via an affiliated regional/state science fair

competitions.typical_window: affiliated fairs winter/spring; ISEF in May
competitions.source_notes: Reach ISEF by winning a top prize at an affiliated local/regional/state fair. 2026 ISEF was May 9-15 (Phoenix).

competitions.name: National History Bee (International Academic Competitions)
competitions.typical_window: regional qualifiers Oct-Apr; nationals late April
competitions.source_notes: Varsity & Junior Varsity divisions. 2026 nationals Apr 26 (Arlington, VA). Online & in-person regionals.

competitions.name: National History Bowl (International Academic Competitions)
competitions.typical_window: regional tournaments fall-spring; nationals late April
competitions.source_notes: Team format (school clubs). Same championship weekend as the History Bee.

competitions.name: US History Bee (International Academic Competitions)

access.notes: online qualifiers + in-person at championship weekend

competitions.typical_window: qualifiers through the year; finals late April
competitions.source_notes: US-history-focused individual buzzer competition under the IAC umbrella.

competitions.name: National History Day
competitions.cost: low entry fee; varies by affiliate
competitions.typical_window: annual theme; school/regional winter; state spring; nationals June
competitions.source_notes: Project-based (papers, documentaries, exhibits, performances, websites). CONFIRM your state affiliate dates/theme.

competitions.name: National Geography Bee / US Geography Championships (IAC)
competitions.cost: registration fee; online qualifying exam often free
competitions.typical_window: qualifying exams through the year; championships spring
competitions.source_notes: This is the LIVE geography competition (IAC) — NOT the discontinued Nat Geo GeoBee. Divisions: Elementary (1-4), Intermediate (5-6), Middle (7-8), High School (9-12).

competitions.name: National Science Bee (International Academic Competitions)

access.notes: free online regional qualifying exam + in-person finals

competitions.cost: online regional qualifying exam free; finals fee
competitions.typical_window: online regional exam late March; regional finals April; nationals late April
competitions.source_notes: Free online regional qualifying exam pathway. 2026 online regional finals were Apr 11.

competitions.name: North South Foundation (NorthSouth) Regional Contests
competitions.cost: low per-contest fee; proceeds fund scholarships
competitions.typical_window: regional contests each spring (Mar-Apr); nationals summer
competitions.source_notes: Multiple contests: spelling, vocabulary, math, science, geography, public speaking, essay. 75+ chapters. CONFIRM nearest chapter.

competitions.name: Scripps National Spelling Bee

access.notes: school enrolls; regional bee pathway to nationals (DC)

competitions.typical_window: school bees fall/winter; regionals spring; nationals late May
competitions.source_notes: Grade 8 and below, under age 15. School must enroll in the program. 2026 finals held at DAR Constitution Hall, DC.

competitions.name: Scholastic Art & Writing Awards

access.notes: regional affiliate by area; online submission

competitions.typical_window: submissions fall; regional results winter; nationals spring
competitions.source_notes: Writing (and art) categories, grades 7-12. Current-year original work. CONFIRM regional affiliate & deadline.

competitions.name: NSDA Speech & Debate

access.notes: join a school team; local district tournaments

competitions.typical_window: tournaments through the school year; nationals June
competitions.source_notes: Via a school speech & debate team. Middle school and high school programs. CONFIRM your district schedule.

competitions.name: Model United Nations (conferences)
competitions.typical_window: conferences throughout the school year
competitions.source_notes: Many independent conferences (university-hosted). Join via a school MUN club. CONFIRM specific conference.

competitions.name: National Latin Exam
competitions.typical_window: administered in a window each spring (Feb-Mar)
competitions.source_notes: School/teacher registers. CONFIRM current-year window.

competitions.name: National Spanish Exam
competitions.typical_window: administered in a window each spring
competitions.source_notes: School/teacher registers. CONFIRM current-year window.

competitions.name: National French Exam (Le Grand Concours)
competitions.typical_window: administered in a window each spring (Jan-Mar)
competitions.source_notes: AATF-run. School/teacher registers. CONFIRM current-year window.

competitions.name: National Geographic GeoBee
competitions.source_notes: DO NOT LIST AS AVAILABLE.
competitions.discontinued_note: Discontinued by National Geographic in 2021. Use the IAC National Geography Bee (id: national-geography-bee) instead.
